calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nicole Kelly for administrator Nicole Jackson, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the Verified First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, Petition for Statutory Commissions, Attorney's Fees, Extraordinary Fees, and Order for Final Distribution.

The Court confirmed with beneficiary Neil Jackson that he understood and agreed to the proposed distribution of his share into the Special Needs Trust established for his benefit. Mr. Jackson affirmed his consent.

Ms. Kelly confirmed there were no objections to the petition.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
